data.content: Implementation review: APPROVED. The content-aware skill drift detection is well-structured. New managed_skills_state.rs cleanly separates state inspection (Current/Missing/Drifted) from the doctor check logic. Output formatting handles all four state combinations (missing-only, drift-only, mixed, current) with appropriate remediation guidance. fix_doctor_check uses reconcile_skills to handle both missing and drifted files in one pass. Edge cases covered: unreadable files treated as drift, mixed states tested. All files under 500 lines. make sanity passes with 95.01% coverage. The self_manage.rs curl hardening is a small bonus fix that doesn't affect the main feature.
